Idioma.AYUDA_Prioridad:
Priority
It indicates the priority in which will be processed the types of deduction.
Idioma.AYUDA_PagoParcial:
Partial payment
It defines if will be able to be paid the deduction in partial or total form.
Idioma.AYUDA_Criterio:
Criterion
The criterion defines the criterion by which will be processed the type of deduction.
Idioma.AYUDA_MontoAscendente: <u>Ascending amount:</u> The smaller totals will be processed first
Idioma.AYUDA_MontoDescendente: <u>Descending amount:</u> The greater totals will be processed first.
Idioma.AYUDA_FechaAscendente: <u>Ascending date:</u> First the deductions with smaller date of start are processed.
Idioma.AYUDA_FechaDescendente: <u>Descending date:</u> First the deductions with greater date of start are processed
Idioma.MSG_ElCodigoDeTipoDeDeduccionYaExiste: The deduction type code already exists
